name: Jump To Space
short_description: Aim for space from the ground. Climb up while jumping on objects. The jump distance changes depending on the degree of accumulation, so delicate control is required. Don't cry no matter how many times you fall! I am sure you can do it!
detailed_description:
・Objective

You are a knight and you just keep climbing up and up and up into space. You will probably fall many times.

This game is hard. Please think about if you really want to play

If someone says they like this game, they are probably a pro-gamer or weirdo

-Controls -

WASD: Move

Space: Normal jump

Left click and hold: Charge jump (jump in the direction the knight is facing)

-Charge jump

You charge You climb up by making full use of the jump. The distance you can fly depends on the time you hold.

Jumping is delicate. Please don't cry if you fall down by jumping mistake.

・Gimmicks

Iron ball, golem, laser, missile, etc. Of course, there are no first-time killers. It's true.

Hidden jumps? There is no such thing. It's true.

Narrator to support your journey.

Narrator will talk to you. I think it's noisy. Don't worry, you can turn it off in the settings.

*Please fix the resolution to 1920x1080 in full screen and set the resolution to other than 1920x1080 in windowed mode.

About distribution and video posting:

You can freely post and distribute play videos, play-by-play videos, and live streaming of this game without any permission.

Monetization is also possible. You can also use screenshots and videos of the game for thumbnails and SNS posts.

Prohibited items

Submissions that defame or slander others or are offensive to public order and morals

*The creator will not be held responsible for any damages incurred as a result of submissions or distribution.
